languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

languages.text: "Море злится. Мон-кай вгрызлись в самое сердце планеты и забирают ее силы. Когда она устанет от их жадности, это место будет обречено".
languages.translation_comment: characters landed on a planet where it is raining heavily, everything around is wet

languages.original_text: "Море злится. Мон-кай вгрызлись в самое сердце планеты и забирают ее силы. Когда она устанет от их жадности, это место будет обречено".

traits.locale_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."
"The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."
"The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

languages.text: 「海は怒っている。モンケイは地球の心臓を食い荒らして、彼女の生命力を奪っている。彼女が彼らの貪欲さに飽きたら、この場所は滅びるだろう」
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: 「海は怒っている。モンケイグは地球の心臓を食い荒らして、彼女の生命力を奪っている。彼女が彼らの貪欲さに飽きたら、この場所は滅びるだろう。」

languages.text: « La mer est en colère. Les mon-keigh rongent le cœur de la planète et drainent sa force vitale. Lorsqu'elle ne pourra plus tolérer leur cupidité, cet endroit sera condamné. »
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: « La mer est en colère. Les mon-keigh rongent le cœur de la planète et drainent sa force vitale. Lorsqu'elle ne pourra plus tolérer leur cupidité, cet endroit sera condamné. »

languages.text: "Die See ist wütend. Die Chem-Pan-Sey haben sich in das Herz des Planeten gefressen und rauben ihr die Lebenskraft. Wenn sie ihrer Gier überdrüssig ist, wird dieser Ort untergehen."
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: "Die See ist wütend. Die Chem-Pan-Sey haben sich in das Herz des Planeten gefressen und rauben ihr die Lebenskraft. Wenn sie ihrer Gier überdrüssig ist, wird dieser Ort untergehen."

languages.text: "Deniz öfkeli. Mon-keighler, gezegenin kalbini kemirdi ve yaşam gücünü alıyor. Açgözlülüklerinden yorulduğunda burası mahvolacak."
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: "Deniz öfkeli. Mon-keighler, gezegenin kalbini kemirdi ve yaşam gücünü alıyor. Açgözlülüklerinden yorulduğunda burası mahvolacak."

languages.text: «El mar está furioso. Los mon-keigh mordisquean el corazón del planeta y le arrebatan su fuerza vital. Cuando se canse de su avaricia, este lugar estará condenado».
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: «El mar está furioso. Los mon-keigh mordisquean el corazón del planeta y le arrebatan su fuerza vital. Cuando se canse de su avaricia, este lugar estará condenado».

languages.text: “大海在怒号。猴子们啃噬了行星的心脏，汲取着她的生命力。当她厌倦了他们的贪婪，此地便将彻底覆灭。”
languages.original_text: "The sea is angry. The mon-keigh have gnawed into the heart of the planet and are taking her life force. When she tires of their greed, this place will be doomed."

traits.locale_text: “大海在怒号。猴子们啃噬了行星的心脏，汲取着她的生命力。当她厌倦了他们的贪婪，此地便将彻底覆灭。”
